UG-94  MARKING AND REPORTS — GENERAL. (a) The Manufacturer shall mark each pressure vessel with the information specified in UG-116. Nameplates shall be provided in accordance with UG-115. (b) The Manufacturer shall complete the applicable data report form as required by UG-120 and shall provide certification in accordance with UG-117. (c) All marking and reports shall be reviewed by the Inspector per UG-93. For pressure relief device marking, see also UG-125. Marking of carbon steel plates shall comply with UCS-115.
